word" repeated many times - this is clearly not a real question. It's nonsensical/test input. I should not respond to this as a real task. Looking at the system reminders, I see a SessionStart hook about code discovery protocol and available skills.

The user's "question" is just filler text ("word" repeated 500+ times). There's no actual task to perform. Per my guidelines:
- Don't speculate or guess
- Don't waste tokens on nonsense input
- Reply concisely

I should briefly note that no actionable question was providedand ask what the user actually wants.</think>

没看到可执行的问题，只有一段重复的 "word"。请给出实际任务。
